healthReason: KE-3 sprint COMPLETE — all 5 issues resolved. PR #1361 merged (closes #1341 + #1322). No open squad PRs. No blockers. Next sprint KE-4 (#1359: default enforcement mode monitor) ready to begin.
summary: KE-3 sprint closed out this cycle. PR #1361 (bootstrap hardening: node_modules/.modules.yaml sentinel + trailing test-f binary check) merged with 4/4 CI green, closing #1341 and #1322. PR #1303 (KE-2 Go kernel, conflicting) closed — issues #955/#957 already resolved. No P0/P1 issues open. New sprint KE-4 identified: change default enforcement mode from guide to monitor (#1359). PR #1371 (bootstrap rtk-prefix fix, CI green) flagged for architect review — no squad ownership but closes dogfood #1347.

sprintTransition.nextGoal: Change default enforcement mode from guide to monitor — zero-friction onboarding (#1359)

mergedThisCycle.title: fix(bootstrap): harden SessionStart install + build detection (#1341, #1322)
mergedThisCycle.note: Merged with 4/4 CI green. Closes #1341 (pnpm .modules.yaml sentinel) + #1322 (trailing test-f binary check). 796 tests passing, 38 pre-existing failures (no regressions).

closedThisCycle.title: feat(ke-2): wire Go kernel into claude-hook + TS pre-resolves packs/YAML
closedThisCycle.note: Closed (not merged). Was conflicting and stale — issues #955/#957 already closed in prior cycle.

newAssignments.title: [kernel] Change default enforcement mode from guide to monitor
newAssignments.note: KE-4 sprint anchor. Product decision with May 6 conference deadline. Scope: claude-init wizard (line 194), agentguard.yaml template (line 13, currently 'educate'), README quick start, site messaging. Small surface area, high leverage.

notableIssues.title: [kernel] Change default enforcement mode from guide to monitor
notableIssues.label: enhancement
notableIssues.note: KE-4 sprint anchor. Current wizard default is 'guide' (claude-init.ts:194). agentguard.yaml default is 'educate'. Issue requests 'monitor' as default — visibility first, enforcement opt-in. Conference demo May 6.

notableIssues.title: fix(bootstrap): strip rtk prefix before bootstrap allowlist matching
notableIssues.note: CI green (4/4), MERGEABLE, no approval. Tier C from copilot-cli squad. Closes dogfood #1347. Flagged for architect review before merge.

notableIssues.title: [dogfood] Bootstrap exemption blocked when rtk prefix used
notableIssues.label: dogfood
notableIssues.note: Covered by PR #1371 (CI green). Waiting on review.

escalationRules.notes: No escalation triggers fired. All clear.

dogfoodObservations.description: Worktree build failure at session start: turbo cache miss for @red-codes/agentguard caused fresh tsc compilation, which failed because node_modules workspace symlinks are absent in this worktree (test -d node_modules passes on empty dir — old pre-#1361 hook). Pre-existing dist/bin.js masked the failure. New worktrees created after #1361 merge will use .modules.yaml sentinel and pnpm install --force, avoiding this. Existing worktrees remain affected until recreated.
No governance denials encountered during this EM cycle. AgentGuard operating normally.

testHealth.note: From PR #1361 CI run. Full workspace test run last confirmed 2026-03-25 (4129/4129). QA squad overdue for fresh run — no squad test run since 2026-03-25.
